Rants

Thinking out loud.

Half-formed thoughts and strong opinions loosely held. Not polished, occasionally wrong, always mine. Cannot make any promises about whether they are worth your time.

writing

  • Mobile is harder than it looks July 10, 2026 I spent years on ML and web before I shipped a phone app. Turns out the app is the easy part.
  • Why even keep a rants page July 1, 2026 A resumé tells you what I did. It doesn't tell you how I think.
